posts.content: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: grayerman
posts.content:
[Predictions]

We all know this is really just a Texas card.
Jacobe Smith, Alden Coria, Adrian Yanez, Yadier Del Valle, Ramiz Brahimaj, Zach Reese, Michael Aswell, John Yannis, and Chris Gutierrez are all names I'd like to see here.

They could rebook Smith vs Korean Tyson.
Alden Coria vs Estevam or Hyun Sung Park
Del Valle vs Javier Reyes
Brahimaj vs Khaos Williams
Reese vs Powerbar

posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Amanda Ribas vs Fatima Kline
Pick: Kline via decision
88% of Tapology users (8 users) are picking Kline (28% decision)
Kline is 6.9 years younger (26.0 vs 32.9)
Kline has 1” reach edge (67” vs 66”)
Kline has +2.30 strike differential/min vs +0.97
Kline proj. +7.6 significant strikes attempted
Kline proj. +8.6 significant strikes landed
Kline proj. +12.5 head strikes landed
Kline proj. 0.25 knockdowns vs 0.03
Ribas proj. 2.0 takedowns landed (3.9 attempts) vs 1.3 takedowns landed (3.5 attempts)
Ribas proj. 4.4 mins of control time vs 2.6 mins
Ribas proj. 0.60 submission attempts vs 0.00
Kline proj. 37.5% finish chance vs 17.5% and 45.0% decision

Both fighters proj. for 0.00 knockdowns
